title: Monk's Friend

startPoint.en: Speak to Brother Omad at the Monastery south of Ardougne.
startPoint.es: Habla con Brother Omad en el Monastery al sur de Ardougne.

items.name: Jug of water
items.display: A jug of water (you can buy a jug at the general stores in Port Khazard; there is a sink in a house to the south of the monastery)

items.name: Logs
items.display: Normal logs (there are plenty of trees nearby)

kills: You can choose to defeat two level 21 thieves and a level 25 head thief.

text.en: Talk to Brother Omad on the 1st floor of the Monastery south of East Ardougne zoo.
text.es: Habla con Brother Omad en la 1ª planta del Monastery al sur del East Ardougne zoo.

text.en: Exit the monastery and head west to the location shown on the map, there is a circle of stones (not visible on the minimap).
text.es: Sal del monastery y dirígete al oeste hasta la ubicación indicada en el mapa, hay un círculo de piedras (no visible en el minimapa).

text.en: Stand in the circle of stones and climb down the ladder that appears. The stones are the same colour as the grass in high graphics modes, and are very easy to overlook.
text.es: Ponte de pie en el círculo de piedras y baja por la escalera que aparece. Las piedras son del mismo color que la hierba en modos gráficos altos, y son muy fáciles de pasar por alto.

text.en: Go south, enter the room with thieves, and grab the Child's blanket on the table to the east.
text.es: Ve al sur, entra en la sala con los thieves, y coge el Child's blanket que hay sobre la mesa al este.

text.en: Return to the monastery and talk to Brother Omad.
text.es: Vuelve al monastery y habla con Brother Omad.

chatOptions: 1 Is there anything else I can help with?

text.en: North of the Monastery and near a crashed cart, Brother Cedric will be wandering around. Talk to him.
text.es: Al norte del Monastery y cerca de un carro accidentado, Brother Cedric estará deambulando por la zona. Habla con él.

text.en: Talk to him again to give him a jug of water.
text.es: Habla con él otra vez para darle un jug of water.

text.en: Talk to him once more to give him a set of logs.
text.es: Habla con él una vez más para darle un set of logs.

text.en: Pop a balloon for area task.
text.es: Revienta un globo para la tarea de área.
